; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-04-09T02:48:27Z

AFFECT [[6163493716185020606]]
    TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
        REBUILD [[11925893266903827905]]
            LOCATE BEFORE { ~&"214583350385&~ }
            REMOVE LOCATED
            INSERT { ~&7712934851008712&~.~&14140055321554169705&~(~&254543134825829310&~) }
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
